aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Objective and details of Startup Assistance Platform and Bihar Laghu Udyami Yojana
aboutUs.para1: To generate interest among the youth of the state in establishing industries and to promote micro and small industries, the state government implemented the Mukhyamantri SC/ST Udyami Yojana in 2018, Mukhyamantri EBC Udyami Yojana in 2020, Mukhyamantri Mahila Udyami Yojana and Yuva Udyami Yojana in 2021, and the Mukhyamantri Minority Udyami Yojana in 2023.
aboutUs.para2: The Startup Assistance Platform is an ambitious scheme of the state government dedicated to establishing maximum industries and increasing employment opportunities in the state. Eliminating the problem of collateral security and margin money in obtaining bank loans for industry establishment is the main objective of this scheme.
aboutUs.para3: Under this scheme, there is a provision to provide 50 percent of the total project cost (maximum Rs 5 lakh) as a grant/subsidy and 50 percent (maximum Rs 5 lakh) as an interest-free loan under the special incentive scheme to the youth of the relevant sectors. Only under the Mukhyamantri Yuva Udyami, along with other provisions, a 1 percent annual interest on the loan has been provisioned. Additionally, a provision of Rs 25,000 per unit is made to assist with beneficiary training and the project monitoring committee. This scheme is being implemented by the Bihar Start-up Fund Trust.
